chunks.text: ECE Major Lower Division Degree Requirements - EECS at Berkeley ECE Major Lower Division Degree Requirements Math Math 51 (Calculus 1) Math 52 (Calculus 2) Math 53 Math 54 Math 51 can be satisfied with at least a “3” on the AP AB or BC Calculus exam, at least a “5” on the IB Math Higher Level, or at least a “B” on A-Level Math Math 52 can be satisfied with a “5” on the AP BC Calculus exam or at least a “B” on A-Level Further Math. Math 53 (Multivariable Calculus) Math 54 (Linear Algebra and Differential Equations) Students can also use Physics 89 to satisfy this requirement. Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences CS 61A CS 61C EECS 16A EECS 16B CS 61A (Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs) CS 61C (Machine Structures) EECS 16A (Foundations of Signals, Dynamical Systems, and Information Processing EECS 16B (Introduction to Circuits and Devices) Science Physics Science Elective Physics 7A and Physics 7B or Physics 5A and Physics 5B + 5BL ASTRON 7A, 7B; BIOLOGY 1A+1AL, 1B; CHEM 1A+1AL, 1B, 3A+3AL, 3B+3BL, 4A, 4B; MCB 32+32L; PHYSICS 5C+5CL, 7C; an upper division course of at least three units in ASTRON, CHEM (except 100, 149, or 192), EPS (except C100), IB (except 101, C105, 191), MCB, or PHYSICS (except 100).
